Avenula pubescens has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion.

Avenula pubescens is commonly used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
